title: Verify deterministic reconciliation candidate projection
preconditions: Representative active, reconciled, voided, superseded, account-mismatched, amount-mismatched, and conflicting-evidence transactions plus approved statement-row facts and deterministic-policy identities.
steps: Request candidate projections for zero, one, multiple, excluded, repeated, and provider-field inputs; compare candidates, order, reason codes, and state before and after.
expected: Only compatible active unreconciled candidates appear; outcome classification and reasons are deterministic; excluded cases are explained; no projection mutates evidence, decisions, or transactions.
